Package calendar.controller.util

Class DateTimeParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • calendar.controller.util.DateTimeParser
  • public class DateTimeParser
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility class for parsing date and time strings. Handles conversion between string representations and LocalDateTime/LocalDate objects.

    Expected formats:

    • DateTime: "YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm" (ISO 8601)
    • Date: "YYYY-MM-DD" (ISO 8601)

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter DATE_FORMAT
      Standard ISO 8601 date format.
      static java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter DATE_TIME_FORMAT
      Standard ISO 8601 date-time format.

    • Method Detail

      • parseDateTime

        public static java.time.LocalDateTime parseDateTime​(java.lang.String dateTimeStr)
        Parses a date-time string to LocalDateTime.
        Parameters:
        dateTimeStr - the date-time string in format "YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm"
        Returns:
        the parsed LocalDateTime
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the string is null, empty, or invalid format

      • parseDate

        public static java.time.LocalDate parseDate​(java.lang.String dateStr)
        Parses a date string to LocalDate.
        Parameters:
        dateStr - the date string in format "YYYY-MM-DD"
        Returns:
        the parsed LocalDate
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the string is null, empty, or invalid format

      • formatDateTime

        public static java.lang.String formatDateTime​(java.time.LocalDateTime dateTime)
        Formats a LocalDateTime to string.
        Parameters:
        dateTime - the LocalDateTime to format
        Returns:
        formatted string in "YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm" format
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if dateTime is null

      • formatDate

        public static java.lang.String formatDate​(java.time.LocalDate date)
        Formats a LocalDate to string.
        Parameters:
        date - the LocalDate to format
        Returns:
        formatted string in "YYYY-MM-DD" format
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if date is null

      • isValidDateTime

        public static boolean isValidDateTime​(java.lang.String dateTimeStr)
        Validates if a string is a valid date-time format.
        Parameters:
        dateTimeStr - the string to validate
        Returns:
        true if valid, false otherwise

      • isValidDate

        public static boolean isValidDate​(java.lang.String dateStr)
        Validates if a string is a valid date format.
        Parameters:
        dateStr - the string to validate
        Returns:
        true if valid, false otherwise
